mapper.sql: r.id, r.name, r.contact, r.expected_locations, r.work_years, r.education, r.salary_min, r.salary_max, r.skills, r.project_experience, r.job_status, r.update_time, r.create_time, r.modify_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume (name, contact, expected_locations, work_years, education, salary_min, salary_max, skills, project_experience, job_status, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{contact}, #{expectedLocations}, #{workYears}, #{education}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{skills}, #{projectExperience}, #{jobStatus}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, contact, expected_locations, work_years, education, salary_min, salary_max, skills, project_experience, job_status, update_time, create_time, modify_time FROM resume WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, contact, expected_locations, work_years, education, salary_min, salary_max, skills, project_experience, job_status, update_time, create_time, modify_time FROM resume WHERE name = #{name} AND contact = #{contact}

SELECT , (f.user_id IS NOT NULL) AS is_favorite, f.fitted_position FROM resume r LEFT JOIN user_resume_favorite f ON r.id = f.resume_id AND f.user_id = #{userId}
ORDER BY r.update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT , (f.user_id IS NOT NULL) AS is_favorite, f.fitted_position FROM resume r LEFT JOIN user_resume_favorite f ON r.id = f.resume_id AND f.user_id = #{userId}
